lucidity.config.colors.comment.body_rot_: Color used to visualize entity body rotation
lucidity.config.colors.comment.creaking_: Color for the creaking heart indicator overlay
lucidity.config.colors.comment.ender_dra: Color for the ender dragon's destruction range visualization
Color for ender dragon waypoint markers
lucidity.config.colors.comment.explosion: Color for the explosion center point marker
Color for visualizing blocks destroyed by explosions
lucidity.config.colors.comment.item_merg: Color for visualizing item merge range
lucidity.config.colors.comment.sample_po: Color for entity sample points exposed to explosion damage
Color for entity sample points protected from explosion damage
lucidity.config.colors.comment.sculk_sen: Color used to render the sculk sensor detection range
lucidity.config.colors.comment.wither_de: Color for the wither's destruction range visualization
lucidity.config.colors.comment.y_rot_col: Color used to visualize Y-axis rotation
lucidity.config.explosion_visualizer.com: Visualize blocks affected by explosion destruction
Display ray casting lines from explosion to blocks
Show sample points used for entity explosion damage calculation
Display the center point of explosions
Main toggle for explosion visualization rendering
Display ray casting from entity sample points to explosion
lucidity.config.features.comment.block_n: Disables random positional offsets applied to certain block models
lucidity.config.features.comment.boat_re: Visualize view restrictions while riding a boat
lucidity.config.features.comment.carpet_: Enhances the visual display of Carpet TIS microtiming markers when mouse hovered on "#" in chat
lucidity.config.features.comment.contain: Preview redstone signal strength from containers
lucidity.config.features.comment.coordin: Calculate and display corresponding coordinates between Overworld and Nether
lucidity.config.features.comment.creakin: Display indicator for creaking heart blocks
lucidity.config.features.comment.ender_d: Visualize the ender dragon's block destruction range
lucidity.config.features.comment.falling: Previews the landing position of falling blocks
lucidity.config.features.comment.fluid_s: Allows fluid source to use custom textures.
lucidity.config.features.comment.fluid_t: Override fluid rendering to make it transparent
lucidity.config.features.comment.invisib: Overrides the transparency of invisible entities to make them visible
lucidity.config.features.comment.item_me: Visualize the range within which items can merge
lucidity.config.features.comment.sculk_s: Visualize the detection range of sculk sensors
lucidity.config.features.comment.sound_v: Visualizes sound events in the world
lucidity.config.features.comment.vault_i: Highlights the content inside trial spawners and vaults, making it easier to see.
lucidity.config.features.comment.wither_: Visualize the wither's block destruction range
lucidity.config.features.comment.world_e: Renders additional models above specific blocks to make them more noticeable. Inspired by the OMMC mod, but more powerful.
lucidity.config.features.comment.zalgo_t: Removes visual obfuscation effects from & k text
lucidity.config.generic.comment.fluid_tr: Fluid transparency when Fluid Transparency Override is enabled
lucidity.config.generic.comment.invisibl: Transparency level used when rendering invisible entities (0.0 = fully invisible, 1.0 = fully visible)
lucidity.config.generic.comment.sculk_de: Maximum range for detecting sculk-related events
lucidity.config.generic.comment.world_ea: Vertical render height offset for the World Eater Helper (Due to technical limitations, the maximum supported value is 7.8).

Target blocks detected by the World Eater Helper. Supported expressions:
Block ID: a specific block
Block ID[block states]: a block matching the specified states
#Block Tag: any block with the specified tag
#Block Tag[block states]: any block with the specified tag and states
any / * / ? / %[block states]: any block matching the specified states
Enables rendering images in the world using blocks
List of images to be rendered ( <image_source(Path/URL)>;<image_id>; <position(x,y,z)>;<rotation(x,y,z)>;<scale(x,y)> )
Number of image pixels represented by a single block
lucidity.config.other.comment.yacl_like_: Use a YACL-style layout for the configuration screen
